meta.scenario: drop swap — both tracks at peak energy, 8-bar hard blend, energy stays up

transition_arc: Both tracks are in full drop sections (rms > 0.65, drums > 0.7). A 16-bar gradual blend would cause energy to dip and sound underwhelming. Instead: 8-bar aggressive overlap with drums:1.0 (T2 full kick immediately), bass_swap at bar 4 of the window, and T1 out in 8 bars. The combined energy briefly peaks during bars 4-8 of the overlap — this sounds like a massive energy surge rather than a dip. The +1 Camelot move (2A→1A) is safe. After the swap, T2 carries the energy forward.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 0: immediate full drop energy, kick+bass+synths, RMS 0.70
annotated_actions.why: Tech house track enters at full groove.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 56: still in full drop, rms=0.68
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 0: about to be faded in at bar 56 with full drums
annotated_actions.why: Pre-emptively reduce T1's low end slightly before the overlap to prevent combined bass overload when T2's full kick enters at bar 56. T1 low=0.7 (not 0.5 — we still want punch, just controlled).

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 0: full drop — kick hits immediately, rms=0.68, drums=0.85
annotated_actions.why: drums:1.0 — T2's kick comes in at full force immediately. This is NOT a subtle intro. The combined kick of T1+T2 for 4 bars creates an energy surge that feels intentional. bass:0.0 still held — the simultaneous bass would be too muddy even for a drop swap. other:0.8 — the synth drop layer of T2 is fully audible (same energy level as T1's drop).

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 60: still in drop but 4 bars into fade_out, drums=0.60, bass=0.50 (reducing)
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 4 (from_bar=0, 4 bars faded): bass about to enter fully
annotated_actions.why: Midpoint of the 8-bar window. Earlier than a standard 16-bar swap midpoint. T1's bass is still present at 0.5 — the swap here cuts it cleanly before T2's bass fully locks in. With 8-bar overlaps, the swap must fire earlier.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 56: starts fading simultaneously with T2 fade_in
annotated_actions.why: 8-bar fade_out (not 16). Hard, fast exit. T1 is gone at bar 64. The energy surge during the 8-bar overlap is the defining moment of this technique.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 8: still in full drop, kick+bass fully established, RMS 0.70
annotated_actions.why: T2 full mix at bar 8 (still in the drop). T1 gone at bar 64. Energy has not dipped — the transition is a surge, not a blend.
